reviews.author: Nicoline Collins
reviews.text: Technician Michael provided exceptional service. He was professional, knowledgeable, on-time, and efficient. He properly diagnosed and fixed the issues with our Bertazzoni refrigerator when other service providers could not.

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Extremely professional, very efficient, reasonable in price, patient, and informative to the customer.

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Curtis was very nice and professional. He fixed our washer in a short period of time, but took the time to explain and show us what the problem was.

reviews.author: Angi Customer
reviews.text: Very professional on the phone. Service fee was half of what other companies quoted. A $49 service call that was included in the repair with an itemized breakdown.

reviews.author: Nancy V.
reviews.text: Call Curtis at Cityboysrus.com $49.00 service call. He does all my work.

notes: City Boys R Us appliance repair. Owner/face Curtis; named technician Michael. Atlanta (3348 Peachtree Rd NE, Suite 700). $49 service call flat-fee pricing. 391 reviews is substantial.

capture_attempts.reason: 6 verbatim reviews captured from HTML inline review-feed
